headline: Charles Schwab Keeps Staggered Board As Stock Trades Below Analyst Targets

The decision means the company will keep its staggered board structure, with directors serving multi year terms instead of standing for election annually. For you as an investor, this governance decision sits alongside the core story of Charles Schwab as a large US brokerage and wealth management company.
